attributes.description: Global attribute extraction rules — maps attribute names to their rule configuration

elementRule.description: Extraction rule for an HTML/XML element

ruleTypes.description: Extraction rule types for this element

x-enumDescriptions.INLINE: Inline element — content flows within surrounding text (e.g. <b>, <span>, <a>)
x-enumDescriptions.INLINE_EXCLUDED: Inline element excluded by a conditional rule
x-enumDescriptions.INLINE_INCLUDED: Inline element included by a conditional rule (exception to EXCLUDE)
x-enumDescriptions.TEXTUNIT: Text unit — extracted as a translatable segment with skeleton before/after
x-enumDescriptions.EXCLUDE: Excluded — element and all children are skipped during extraction
x-enumDescriptions.INCLUDE: Included — exception to an EXCLUDE rule, re-enables extraction inside excluded block
x-enumDescriptions.ATTRIBUTES_ONLY: Only attributes are translatable/localizable, not the element's text content
x-enumDescriptions.SERVER: Server element — embedded server-side content (e.g. JSP, PHP, Mason tags)

elementType.description: Semantic type hint for UI display (e.g. bold, italic, link, image, paragraph, underlined)

readOnlyLocalizableAttributes.description: Attributes to extract as read-only localizable content (locale-specific but not user-editable)

idAttributes.description: Comma-separated list of attributes to use as IDs.

attributeRule.description: Global extraction rule for an HTML/XML attribute

x-enumDescriptions.ATTRIBUTE_TRANS: Translatable — attribute content is extracted for translation
x-enumDescriptions.ATTRIBUTE_WRITABLE: Writable localizable — attribute is locale-specific and editable (e.g. URLs, paths)
x-enumDescriptions.ATTRIBUTE_READONLY: Read-only localizable — attribute is locale-specific but not user-editable
x-enumDescriptions.ATTRIBUTE_ID: ID — attribute value is used as the segment identifier
x-enumDescriptions.ATTRIBUTE_PRESERVE_WHITESPACE: Preserve whitespace — attribute controls whitespace preservation state

allElementsExcept.description: Apply this rule to all elements except the listed ones

onlyTheseElements.description: Apply this rule only to the listed elements

prefixItems.description: Value to compare — a single string or array of strings (OR logic for EQUALS/MATCHES, AND logic for NOT_EQUALS)

conditionalAttributeValue.description: Conditional attribute extraction — null (unconditional) or condition tuple(s)

oneOf.description: Multiple conditions (OR logic — extract if any condition matches)

x-enumDescriptions.INLINE: Inline element — content flows within surrounding text (e.g. <b>, <span>, <a>)

x-enumDescriptions.INLINE_INCLUDED: Inline element included by a conditional rule (exception to EXCLUDE)

x-enumDescriptions.INCLUDE: Included — exception to an EXCLUDE rule, re-enables extraction inside excluded block
x-enumDescriptions.ATTRIBUTES_ONLY: Only attributes are translatable/localizable, not the element's text content

readOnlyLocalizableAttributes.description: Attributes to extract as read-only localizable content (locale-specific but not user-editable)

idAttributes.description: Attributes that contain segment IDs (sets the TextUnit name)

attributeRule.description: Global extraction rule for an HTML/XML attribute

x-enumDescriptions.ATTRIBUTE_TRANS: Translatable — attribute content is extracted for translation
x-enumDescriptions.ATTRIBUTE_WRITABLE: Writable localizable — attribute is locale-specific and editable (e.g. URLs, paths)
x-enumDescriptions.ATTRIBUTE_READONLY: Read-only localizable — attribute is locale-specific but not user-editable
x-enumDescriptions.ATTRIBUTE_ID: ID — attribute value is used as the segment identifier
x-enumDescriptions.ATTRIBUTE_PRESERVE_WHITESPACE: Preserve whitespace — attribute controls whitespace preservation state

allElementsExcept.description: Apply this rule to all elements except the listed ones

onlyTheseElements.description: Apply this rule only to the listed elements

preserve.description: Condition that activates whitespace preservation (e.g. [xml:space, EQUALS, preserve])

prefixItems.description: Value to compare — a single string or array of strings (OR logic for EQUALS/MATCHES, AND logic for NOT_EQUALS)

conditionalAttributeValue.description: Conditional attribute extraction — null (unconditional) or condition tuple(s)

oneOf.description: Multiple conditions (OR logic — extract if any condition matches)

assumeWellformed.description: Assume input HTML is well-formed XML. Faster but may fail on non-conforming HTML.

preserveWhitespace.description: Preserve original whitespace in extracted text

attributes.description: Global attribute extraction rules — maps attribute names to their rule configuration

elements.description: Element extraction rules — maps element names to their rule configuration

elementRule.description: Extraction rule for an HTML/XML element

ruleTypes.description: Extraction rule types for this element

x-enumDescriptions.INLINE: Inline element — content flows within surrounding text (e.g. <b>, <span>, <a>)
x-enumDescriptions.INLINE_EXCLUDED: Inline element excluded by a conditional rule
x-enumDescriptions.INLINE_INCLUDED: Inline element included by a conditional rule (exception to EXCLUDE)
x-enumDescriptions.TEXTUNIT: Text unit — extracted as a translatable segment with skeleton before/after
x-enumDescriptions.EXCLUDE: Excluded — element and all children are skipped during extraction
x-enumDescriptions.INCLUDE: Included — exception to an EXCLUDE rule, re-enables extraction inside excluded block
x-enumDescriptions.ATTRIBUTES_ONLY: Only attributes are translatable/localizable, not the element's text content
x-enumDescriptions.SERVER: Server element — embedded server-side content (e.g. JSP, PHP, Mason tags)

elementType.description: Semantic type hint for UI display (e.g. bold, italic, link, image, paragraph, underlined)

translatableAttributes.description: Attributes to extract as translatable content (e.g. alt, title, placeholder)

writableLocalizableAttributes.description: Attributes to extract as writable localizable content (e.g. href, src — locale-specific, editable)

readOnlyLocalizableAttributes.description: Attributes to extract as read-only localizable content (locale-specific but not user-editable)

idAttributes.description: Comma-separated list of attributes to use as IDs.

attributeRule.description: Global extraction rule for an HTML/XML attribute

x-enumDescriptions.ATTRIBUTE_TRANS: Translatable — attribute content is extracted for translation
x-enumDescriptions.ATTRIBUTE_WRITABLE: Writable localizable — attribute is locale-specific and editable (e.g. URLs, paths)
x-enumDescriptions.ATTRIBUTE_READONLY: Read-only localizable — attribute is locale-specific but not user-editable
x-enumDescriptions.ATTRIBUTE_ID: ID — attribute value is used as the segment identifier
x-enumDescriptions.ATTRIBUTE_PRESERVE_WHITESPACE: Preserve whitespace — attribute controls whitespace preservation state

allElementsExcept.description: Apply this rule to all elements except the listed ones

onlyTheseElements.description: Apply this rule only to the listed elements

preserve.description: Condition that activates whitespace preservation (e.g. [xml:space, EQUALS, preserve])

default.description: Condition that restores default whitespace handling (e.g. [xml:space, EQUALS, default])

x-enumDescriptions.MATCHES: Java regex match (must match entire attribute value)

prefixItems.description: Value to compare — a single string or array of strings (OR logic for EQUALS/MATCHES, AND logic for NOT_EQUALS)

conditionalAttributeValue.description: Conditional attribute extraction — null (unconditional) or condition tuple(s)

oneOf.description: Multiple conditions (OR logic — extract if any condition matches)

attributes.description: Global attribute extraction rules — maps attribute names to their rule configuration

elementRule.description: Extraction rule for an HTML/XML element

ruleTypes.description: Extraction rule types for this element

x-enumDescriptions.INLINE: Inline element — content flows within surrounding text (e.g. <b>, <span>, <a>)
x-enumDescriptions.INLINE_EXCLUDED: Inline element excluded by a conditional rule
x-enumDescriptions.INLINE_INCLUDED: Inline element included by a conditional rule (exception to EXCLUDE)
x-enumDescriptions.TEXTUNIT: Text unit — extracted as a translatable segment with skeleton before/after
x-enumDescriptions.EXCLUDE: Excluded — element and all children are skipped during extraction
x-enumDescriptions.INCLUDE: Included — exception to an EXCLUDE rule, re-enables extraction inside excluded block
x-enumDescriptions.ATTRIBUTES_ONLY: Only attributes are translatable/localizable, not the element's text content
x-enumDescriptions.SERVER: Server element — embedded server-side content (e.g. JSP, PHP, Mason tags)

elementType.description: Semantic type hint for UI display (e.g. bold, italic, link, image, paragraph, underlined)

translatableAttributes.description: Attributes to extract as translatable content (e.g. alt, title, placeholder)

writableLocalizableAttributes.description: Attributes to extract as writable localizable content (e.g. href, src — locale-specific, editable)

readOnlyLocalizableAttributes.description: Attributes to extract as read-only localizable content (locale-specific but not user-editable)

idAttributes.description: Attributes that contain segment IDs (sets the TextUnit name)

attributeRule.description: Global extraction rule for an HTML/XML attribute

x-enumDescriptions.ATTRIBUTE_TRANS: Translatable — attribute content is extracted for translation
x-enumDescriptions.ATTRIBUTE_WRITABLE: Writable localizable — attribute is locale-specific and editable (e.g. URLs, paths)
x-enumDescriptions.ATTRIBUTE_READONLY: Read-only localizable — attribute is locale-specific but not user-editable
x-enumDescriptions.ATTRIBUTE_ID: ID — attribute value is used as the segment identifier
x-enumDescriptions.ATTRIBUTE_PRESERVE_WHITESPACE: Preserve whitespace — attribute controls whitespace preservation state

allElementsExcept.description: Apply this rule to all elements except the listed ones

onlyTheseElements.description: Apply this rule only to the listed elements

preserve.description: Condition that activates whitespace preservation (e.g. [xml:space, EQUALS, preserve])

default.description: Condition that restores default whitespace handling (e.g. [xml:space, EQUALS, default])

x-enumDescriptions.MATCHES: Java regex match (must match entire attribute value)

prefixItems.description: Value to compare — a single string or array of strings (OR logic for EQUALS/MATCHES, AND logic for NOT_EQUALS)

conditionalAttributeValue.description: Conditional attribute extraction — null (unconditional) or condition tuple(s)

oneOf.description: Multiple conditions (OR logic — extract if any condition matches)
